description: Google Cloud Contact Center AI Platform is a contact-center-as-a-service product for voice and digital customer interactions. It provides omnichannel contact-center capabilities, including web/mobile support experiences, routing, chat, SMS, and voice workflows.
summary: Google Cloud CCAI Platform exposes tenant-scoped HTTP APIs for Apps and SMS integrations; docs indicate developer-managed API credentials are required, but no public OpenAPI/GraphQL/MCP/CLI surface was found for this domain.
